title: PAU Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Project Associate I Posts
description: Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the various vacancies for the Project Associate I Position. Those candidates who have qualified in the B.E/ B.Tech, M.E/ M.Tech, and M.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the PAU Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply before the last...
